svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ TEXT DETECTION METHODS │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
REGRESSION-BASED (EAST, TextBoxes): ─────────────────────────────────── • Predict bounding boxes directly • Fast but struggles with curved text
SEGMENTATION-BASED (DB, PSENet): ──────────────────────────────── • Predict text/non-text map • Better for arbitrary shapes
┌─────────────────────┐ ┌─────────────────────┐ │ HELLO │ → │ ██████ │ │ WORLD │ │ █████ │ └─────────────────────┘ └─────────────────────┘ Image Probability Map
DBNet (Differentiable Binarization): ───────────────────────────────────── • Learns threshold for binarization • Fast and accurate • SOTA for scene text detection
